titles.en: Chapter on Shortening the Prayer on the Way to Arafat
Chapter on Shortening the Prayer on the Way to Arafat

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ يُتِمُّونَ اَلصَّلاَةَ بِعَرَفَاتٍ فَقَالَ «وَيْلَهُمْ أَوْ وَيْحَهُمْ وَ أَيُّ سَفَرٍ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُ لاَ يُتَمُّ».
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ يُتِمُّونَ اَلصَّلاَةَ بِعَرَفَاتٍ فَقَالَ «وَيْلَهُمْ أَوْ وَيْحَهُمْ وَ أَيُّ سَفَرٍ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُ لاَ يُتَمُّ».

segments:
Hadith.2984 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "The people of Mecca pray the full (four-unit) prayer at Arafat."
Imam (as) said: "Woe to them, or alas for them! What journey is more arduous than this? It should not be performed in full (but shortened to two units)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2984 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "The people of Mecca pray the full (four-unit) prayer at Arafat."
Imam (as) said: "Woe to them, or alas for them! What journey is more arduous than this? It should not be performed in full (but shortened to two units)."
